title: CONTINENTAL, THE
recordings: Jay & Kay 55- W.Marshall 55- F.Sinatra 50- E.Wilkins 60- Quintette H.C.F. 35

notation_notes.structure: Page prints an INTRODUCTION row (4 bars, B A section marker), a first head grid labelled '35 A A' B A'' (sections A, A1, B, C=B-strain, A2), then a MODULATION row (4 bars) and a second grid labelled '46 A B C D' keyed here as D_A..D_F.
notation_notes.c_section: The 'B' letter row of the first head grid (the C section here) uses Abm(maj7) type chords; boxes read Abm/Abm7M, Abm7/Db7, Gbmaj7/Gb7 Eb7, then repeats.
notation_notes.abm7M: Abm7M read as minor-major seventh; recorded literally as printed within split boxes.
notation_notes.legibility: Scan quality is poor; several chord readings in the lower '46 A B C D' grid are uncertain.

llm.modulation_note: Main A sections in Eb major; the s2_B bridge tonicizes Gb (ii-V-I), and after the transition the entire s3 group modulates up to Ab major, where the tune closes.

sections.intro: Vamp: Imaj7-I+ to ii(Fm)-v(Bbm7) oscillation in Eb
sections.s1_A: Same Imaj7-I+ / Fm-Bbm7 vamp, ending Fm-Bb7 (ii-V)
sections.s2_A: ii-V-I loop: Fm7-Bb7-Eb-Cm repeated, cadencing in Eb
sections.s2_A1: Same Fm7-Bb7-Eb-Cm ii-V-I loop in Eb
sections.s2_B: Abm(maj7) line-cliché then Abm7-Db7-Gbmaj7 ii-V-I in Gb, returning via Bb7-Cm7b5-Dbo7-Bb7
sections.transition: Ab pedal for four bars then Eb7, pivoting to the new key
sections.s3_A: I(Ab) sustained with diminished passing chords over V (Eb7)
sections.s3_B: ii(Bbm) prolongation then Eb7-Ab cadence with chromatic dim chords
sections.s3_C: I-V alternation, Cm7b5-F7 to Bbm, cadencing on Eb7 (V of Ab)
sections.s3_D: Ab prolonged, then repeated Bbm-Ebm7 / Abmaj7-Ab7 tag closing firmly in Ab

harmonic_fingerprint.modulation_note: Main A sections in Eb major; the s2_B bridge tonicizes Gb (ii-V-I), and after the transition the entire s3 group modulates up to Ab major, where the tune closes.
